name: Cornmeal-Coated Soft Shell Crab Sand. w/ Adobo Mayo & Bp
recipeIngredient: 4 medium to large soft shell crabs, cleaned and rinsed
salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 teaspoons adobo sauce from a can of chipotle chilis, (up to 3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cleaned crabs in the buttermilk, turning to coat, and allow to sit for 15 minutes.
2. In a shallow dish combine the salt, pepper, cayenne and cornmeal; reserve.
3. In a small bowl whisk together the mayonnaise, mustard, lime juice, adobo sauce and fresh herbs. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if necessary; cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
4. In a small bowl whisk together the lemon juice, orange juice, mustard, orange zest, salt, pepper and cayenne. Gradually whisk in the olive oil in a stream until emulsified. Stir in the fresh herbs. In a large bowl combine the bell peppers and green cabbage, tossing to combine. Pour the vinaigrette over the vegetables and toss to coat. Cover and reserve.
5. Remove crabs from buttermilk, scraping off excess with fingers. Dip in cornmeal mixture; turn to coat. Carefully place in hot oil and cook golden brown on both sides (3-5 minutes total), turning once. Drain on paper towels.
6. Assemble sandwiches by spreading rolls with adobo mayonnaise. Tuck a crab into each roll, top with coleslaw. Garnish plates with lettuce greens, sliced tomatoes and an extra dollop of adobo mayonnaise.
Yield: 4 servings
